doc_title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results and Completion of Self-Share Acquisition via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)

key_facts.reason_jp: 経営環境の変化に対応した機動的な資本政策

summary_en: 15,300 shares acquired at ¥75.43M via ToSTNeT-3 on May 15, 2026. Represents 1.71% of outstanding shares. Execution completed within 17,000-share (1.90% S/O) authorization announced May 14; ¥85M ceiling not fully utilized.
summary_jp: 2026年5月15日、ToSTNeT-3にて15,300株を¥75.43Mで取得。発行済株式の1.71%。5月14日公表の17,000株・¥85M上限以下で執行完了。
tag_en: Buyback Block - 15,300 shares (1.71% S/O) - ¥75.43M - ToSTNeT-3 - Completed
tag_jp: 自己株式取得 - 15,300株（1.71% S/O） - ¥75,429千 - ToSTNeT-3 - 完了

doc_title_en: Notice of Treasury Share Acquisition via Off-Hours Matching Trade (ToSTNeT-3)
summary_en: 17,000 shares (1.90% of shares outstanding), ¥85.0M maximum, ToSTNeT-3 method on May 15, 2026 at ¥4,930/share. Settlement same day. Execution limited to single trading window; partial or full non-execution possible.
summary_jp: 17,000株（発行済株式比1.90%）、上限¥85.0M、ToSTNeT-3、2026年5月15日、1株当たり¥4,930。同日決済。一部又は全部の買付が行われない可能性あり。
tag_en: Buyback - 17,000 shares (1.90% S/O) - ¥85.0M - ToSTNeT-3 block - May 15, 2026
tag_jp: 自己株式買付 - 17,000株（発行済株式比1.90%）- ¥85.0M - ToSTNeT-3 - 2026年5月15日
